title: Club Sponsor Announcement: McLean & Shaw and Economical Select Insurance

content:
We are very excited to announce a new sponsor and member benefit provided by McLean & Shaw Insurance Brokers partnered with Economical Select.

Our connection is through our founding board member Caroline de Vries. Caroline worked extensively as a volunteer to get the Edmonton Squash Club open. As an avid player, referee and volunteer Caroline can often be found on or behind the court hanging out with her favourite squash player,  her husband  John de Vries. Her son is also well known to the squash community as a former national-level junior and current assistant squash pro at the Royal Glenora.

Always looking for opportunities to give back, Caroline has arranged a group home and automobile program that provides exclusive benefits for members of the Edmonton Squash Club.

Information concerning the group program is available at http://www.economicalselect.com/en/home. Be sure to enter our exclusive ESC group code M2304.

For a quotation, you can call 780.452.5561 or email info@mclean-shaw.com.  Be sure to mention you are a member of the Edmonton Squash Club.

McLean & Shaw is located in Summerside and has been serving Edmonton and the surrounding communities for over 60 years. As an independent insurance broker, they are able to search the marketplace for the best combination of coverages and price based on each client’s unique needs. In addition to Personal Insurance, McLean and Shaw has extensive expertise in Commercial Insurance and is able to provide programs for sole proprietors to national accounts. For more information please see www.mclean-shaw.com

If you see Caroline around the club and have any questions about the program or insurance, in general, she would be happy to chat.
